greeting.speaker: Earl
greeting.text: Cid. Slow morning over at the shop. Figured I'd stretch my legs.

choices.text: Good timing. It's been quiet here too.
You seem like you've got something on your mind.

quiet.speaker: Earl
quiet.text: Quiet's good. Quiet means everything's working the way it should.

alright.speaker: Earl
alright.text: Fine as ever. Just keeping an eye on things. Old habit.

something.speaker: Earl
something.text: Ha. Always do. That's what keeps a man sharp.

notice.speaker: Earl
notice.text: You notice anything unusual this morning? Anyone come through you didn't recognize?

choices.text: There was a man in a suit earlier.
Should I be watching for someone?

why_not.speaker: Earl
why_not.text: No reason. Small town. New faces stand out is all.

just_coffee.speaker: Earl
just_coffee.text: Good. You keep it that way. Some conversations aren't worth having.

strange_follow.speaker: Earl
strange_follow.text: Never mind. Just... if he comes back, you come find me first. Before you answer anything.

minigame_follow.speaker: Earl
minigame_follow.text: I mean it Cid. Whatever he asks you to do, you say no. Come find me instead.

watching.speaker: Earl
watching.text: Not specifically. Just stay aware. That's all anyone can do.

farewell.speaker: Earl
farewell.text: I'll be around. You need anything, you know where to find me.
